name: "graph_2"
op {
  name: "arg0_1"
  type: "Data"
  attr {
    key: "index"
    value {
      i: 0
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "y"
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "x"
      }
    }
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "x"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    shape {
      dim: 4
      dim: 8
    }
    layout: "ND"
    attr {
      key: "format_for_int"
      value {
        i: 2
      }
    }
    device_type: "NPU"
  }
  output_desc {
    name: "y"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    shape {
      dim: 4
      dim: 8
    }
    layout: "ND"
    attr {
      key: "format_for_int"
      value {
        i: 2
      }
    }
    attr {
      key: "_meta"
      value {
        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([4, 8])"
      }
    }
    device_type: "NPU"
  }
}

  type: "Data"

    key: "index"

      i: 1

    value {

      dim: 8

      key: "format_for_int"

        i: 2

      value {
        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([8, 16])"
      }

  }
}
op {
  name: "MatMul"
  type: "MatMul"
  input: "arg0_1:0"
  input: "arg1_1:0"
  input: ""
  attr {
    key: "transpose_x2"
    value {
      b: false
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "transpose_x1"
    value {
      b: false
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "y"
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
        i: 1
        i: 2
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "x1"
        s: "x2"
        s: "bias"
      }
    }
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "x1"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    shape {
      dim: 4
      dim: 8
    }
    layout: "ND"
    attr {
      key: "_meta"
      value {
        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([4, 8])"
      }
    }
    device_type: "NPU"
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "x2"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    shape {
      dim: 8
      dim: 16
    }
    layout: "ND"
    attr {
      key: "_meta"
      value {
        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([8, 16])"
      }
    }
    device_type: "NPU"
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "bias"
    attr {
      key: "_is_unfed_optional"
      value {
        i: 1
      }
    }
  }
  output_desc {
    name: "y"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    layout: "ND"
    attr {
      key: "_meta"
      value {
        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([4, 16])"
      }
    }
    attr {
      key: "_fx_tensor_name"
      value {
        s: "matmul-aten.matmul.default.OUTPUT.0"
      }
    }
  }
}
op {
  name: "Relu"
  type: "Relu"
  input: "MatMul:0"
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "y"
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_value"
    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "x"
      }
    }
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "x"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    layout: "ND"

      key: "_meta"

      }
    }
    attr {
      key: "_fx_tensor_name"
      value {
        s: "matmul-aten.matmul.default.OUTPUT.0"
      }
    }
  }
  output_desc {
    name: "y"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT
    layout: "ND"

      key: "_meta"

        s: "Tensor(dtype=torch.float32, shape=torch.Size([4, 16])"
      }
    }
    attr {
      key: "_fx_tensor_name"
      value {
        s: "relu-aten.relu.default.OUTPUT.0"
      }
    }
  }
}
op {
  name: "NetOutput"
  type: "NetOutput"
  input: "Relu:0"
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_value"
    value {
      list {
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_output_name_key"
    value {
      list {

    }
  }
  attr {

    value {
      list {
        i: 0
      }
    }
  }
  attr {
    key: "_input_name_key"
    value {
      list {
        s: "input0"
      }
    }
  }
  input_desc {
    name: "input0"
    dtype: DT_FLOAT

      dim: 4

    }
    layout: "ND"

      key: "_meta"

      }
    }
    attr {
      key: "_fx_tensor_name"
      value {
        s: "relu-aten.relu.default.OUTPUT.0"
      }
    }
  }
}

  value {
    list {
      i: 0
    }
  }
}

  value {
    list {
      i: 1

    }
  }
}

  value {
    i: 1
